title: LoadResourcepackFromServer
description: Have the client download the resource pack directly from the game server.(on the game port)
body:
## Have the client download the resource pack directly from the game server.(on the game port)

## 使客户端能直接从游戏服务器加载资源包（单端口）

## 用法 Usage

将材质包命名为`resourcepack.zip`放置到服务器根目录，并在resource-pack中填入`http\://服务器地址\:端口/resourcepack.zip`（公网）

Name the resource pack `resourcepack.zip`, place it in the server's root directory, and enter `http\://server-address\:port/resourcepack.zip` (public)in the resource-pack field.
